title: macrocarpaea orbiculata
intro: Macrocarpaea orbiculata, also known as the "Mountain Mint," is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Macrocarpaea orbiculata include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and pain management, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Macrocarpaea orbiculata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
